included.name: curl
included.purpose: HTTP/TLS endpoint checks and header collection

included.name: wget
included.purpose: HTTP fetch fallback and health checks

included.name: jq
included.purpose: JSON parsing for API and scanner output

included.name: openssl
included.purpose: TLS certificate, cipher, expiry, and chain inspection

included.name: dnsutils
included.purpose: dig/nslookup DNS, MX, TXT, SPF, and DMARC checks

included.name: nmap
included.purpose: Allowlisted service discovery with explicit approval

included.name: python3-pip
included.purpose: Python package support for controlled scripts

included.name: sqlmap
included.purpose: Low-risk SQL injection validation through Aurict fixed command builders

included.name: nuclei
included.purpose: Template-based vulnerability checks; use curated templates only

included.name: ffuf
included.purpose: Bounded web fuzzing with rate limits and target allowlist

included.name: gobuster
included.purpose: Bounded directory enumeration with rate limits and target allowlist

runtime_requirements: Aurict must request permission for active recon/scan tools
securitySandbox.maxConcurrent defaults to 1 and requestsPerMinute defaults to 30
